description: Create a content slide titled 'Unbundling may be coming' with a sidebar-right layout, two narrative text blocks, and chapter navigation context for The parent trap.

left.body: Bundling every possible facility into a single device was a revolutionary move that gave people access to everything, everywhere, all the time. For adults, the convenience is valuable, but this is neither required nor desirable for children. Most parents want their children to be locatable, contactable and sociable, and able to pay for things while they develop their independence.

right.body: Unbundling everything else will be a challenge, because of the dominance of smartphones in the market and their integration into all parts of people’s lives. But the customer need for a dramatic rebalancing is very much there. It will be a challenging road and will likely feature a lot of failures that could limit attempts to fringe areas, but there’s no doubt the appetite for options is there.
